final:
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input in_bit,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    if (reset) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        out <= {out[2:0], in_bit};
    end
end

endmodule
